title: Ace Drummond
writer: Eddie Rickenbacker, Wyndham Gittens, Norman S. Hall
actors: John 'Dusty' King, Jean Rogers, Noah Beery Jr.
plot: This 13 chapter serial is based on the comic strip character Ace Drummond created by Eddie Rickenbacker. Ace is a 'G-Man of the sky' working out of Washington D.C. He is sent to Mongolia to find out why a mysterious villain known ...
